news.t: BlackRock's Rick Rieder sees ‘epic' cash on sidelines as he takes lead role on new ETF
BlackRock Expands Access to Award-Winning Alpha-Seeking Expertise With Latest Active ETFs

holdings.infoBox: BLCV is an equity ETF with a total of 58 individual holdings. The top holdings are Western Digital stock at 5.94%, Amazon.com at 3.51%, Microsoft at 3.07%, CVS Health at 3.07%, and Wells Fargo & Company at 3.03%.

overview.description: The iShares Large Cap Value Active ETF (BLCV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed to provide exposure to a narrow portfolio US large-cap value stocks. The fund seeks to maximize total return. BLCV was launched on May 19, 2023 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: BlackRock's Rick Rieder sees ‘epic' cash on sidelines as he takes lead role on new ETF
data.text: There's an “epic” amount of cash on the sidelines as investors assess a slowing U.S. economy and the debt-ceiling debate in Washington, according to Rick Rieder, chief investment officer of global fix...

data.title: BlackRock Expands Access to Award-Winning Alpha-Seeking Expertise With Latest Active ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, BlackRock expanded access to its award-winning investment platform with the launch of two active ETFs managed by Rick Rieder and Tony DeSpirito. This milestone provid...
